channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Road is filthy, 10th May
item.description:
Moorfield and Chislehurst Road close to the bench are filthy. No one cleans this street, there are no bins, dog poo everywhere and debris from the over grown trees all over the road. There is a serious drug user issue as well. People sleeping on that bench and taking drugs. I’ve seen drug paraphernalia laying on the ground. This road needs bins cleaning more frequently and cameras. There are drug dealings on the corner where the bench is everyday and no one ever listens to these complaints. I don’t want to received another email telling me the issue has been dealt with when all you do is pick up the litter and leave. It’s not good enough, the residents are scared to get out of their cars when it is dark as it is highly intimidating having drug addicts on that bench all the time. Not to mention the crime. My car and many others are constantly being broken into. What is the council going to do to prevent this? I’ve been sending messages like this for years now and people are getting very tired of it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Moorfield Road, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on the alley, 10th May
item.description:
Fly tipping on the alley on N160LH in front of the bulding 185 flat 11 and 12. This happens very often and it is illegal. It possibile to see who was it from the CCTV installed in the car park? It must be cleaned immediately.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household items fly tipped, 10th May
item.description:
Large amount of old cupboards and furniture fly out outside flats. This is a repeat problem and happens all the time. As well as clearing this up, please con something more permanent done.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricketfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clutter in walkway, 10th May
item.description:
There is constantly an over accumulation of stuff in front of many of the doors at Blandford Court, at Lockner State, this picture is number 38.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Peters Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Lime hire bikes blocking the pavement and road dangerous, 10th May
item.description:
Abandoned Lime hire bikes blocking the pavement and road dangerous as shown in picture. Might hurt somebody. Opposite Hippodrome casino at Little Newport Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Little Newport Street, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Horrendous littering, 10th May
item.description:
Hi there, There is horrendous littering going on at this location. It’s going to cause issues for neighbouring residences and rats. Thanks, Annabelle

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

In road at point hard to avoid.

item.title: Pothole, 10th May
item.description:
Pothole at spot in road where cars must driver over it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duckett Road, Harringay, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish scattered around litter bin, needs urgent and regular clearing, 10th May
item.description:
Rubbish scattered around litter bin, needs urgent and regular clearing as many pedestrians and commuters pass by. Foxes spread rubbish around from food remains, looks awfully untidy. Bromley council please arrange regular and a more frequent cleaning - thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queensway, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fishing on Danson Lake in May, 10th May
item.description:
It is closed season for fishing but today fisherman were by the dam area of the lake fishing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Park, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Lime Hire Bikes parked dangerously, 10th May
item.description:
Abandoned Lime Hire Bikes parked dangerously on pavement Swiss Court TWG Tea.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Leicester Square, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Work completed… slip removed and not tidied afterwards, 10th May
item.description:
Someone on the street had a skip on the road, they’ve had the skip taken away and left this mess all over the floor… no one is taking responsibility for it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Distinct issue with drainage, as indicated by smell of raw sewage, 10th May
item.description:
This relates to 11 Highland Road, where the raw sewage smell is unbearable. There is clearly an issue with the drainage/sewers as there have been several visits of various companies to unblock the drains.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Relocate the food waste bin, 10th May
item.description:
The food waste bin is too close to the bike sheds so school kids use it to climb onto the roof and make a lot of noise and run about. Today someone took a mini scooter up there and was riding up and down on the roof. They all show off climbing up and down repeatedly. Someone could break a leg up there. Please can either the bin be relocated or the roof of the sheds be made inaccessible or both

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lytham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds, 10th May
item.description:
Weeds growth needs containing ASAP, but not just a drive by with road sweep as this doesn't solve the problem.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Somerset Road, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Terrorising public in park, 10th May
item.description:
Stoneham Park Entrances via Medway Road and Shearwood Crescent Men, youths and small children driving fast on quad bikes and motorcycles around the field which is not allowed in that field. They are driving at people walking their dogs or playing with their children The motor vehicles are destroying the grass and bushes that a charity planted and this is causing grave concerns for people using this park This MUST be stopped before someone gets seriously hurt or worse
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stour Road, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crossroads: Uneven rutted surface Pothole outside church entrance, 10th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-9, Sylvan Road, South Norwood, Greater London
